name: mlsys-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for MLSys (Conference on Machine Learning and Systems) submissions: venue fit at the ML-systems intersection, OpenReview submission checks, the short author-response window, camera-ready, badge-driven artifact evaluation, performance-measurement reproducibility, appendix packaging, review process, systems writing style, related work, benchmark-rigor experiments, and cycle workflow. Grounded in the official MLSys 2026 Call for Research Papers, Industrial Track CFP, Call for Artifact Evaluations, dates page, and organizing-committee page, checked on 2026-07-08.
